diagrams.title: Eigenspace Visualization in R²
diagrams.description: Shows how eigenvectors form lines through origin that only get scaled, not rotated
elements: Transformation T represented as stretching/shrinking along eigenvector direction
diagrams.purpose: Understand eigenspace as invariant subspace where transformation acts as scalar multiplication

diagrams.title: Characteristic Polynomial Graph
diagrams.description: Graph of characteristic polynomial showing eigenvalues as x-intercepts
elements: Parabolic curve crossing x-axis at eigenvalues
Points marked: λ=1, λ=3 for matrix [[2,1],[1,2]]
diagrams.purpose: Visualize eigenvalues as roots where det(A-λI)=0

diagrams.title: Diagonalization Process
diagrams.description: Shows transformation between coordinate systems to achieve diagonal form
diagrams.purpose: Understand diagonalization as basis transformation to 'natural' coordinates
